## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] Affected docs in `docs/` updated in this PR
      (if not, explain below)
- [ ] No new dependencies (or: dependency added is justified below)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] `Co-Authored-By: Claude` trailer included where applicable
